claims: All 5 PRD promises realized at current source
No duplicate spawn (claim excludes pid IS NOT NULL)
Non-owner heartbeat rejected (rowcount==1 compare-and-set)
Out-of-scope honored: no Postgres, no SKIP LOCKED, submit not rewritten
confidence_criteria: P1-P5 each map to real public boundary
forbidden outcomes asserted by tests (no over-cap claim, wrong-owner False, popen==[])
single-writer claim + migration v6 + poll bridge present
diff matches PRD scope, out-of-scope respected
outcome.confidence_rationale: Every PRD promise traced to a real boundary and a non-vacuous asserting test in current source; diff scope matches PRD and out-of-scope constraints hold. Held below 0.95 because pytest was not executed this gate (approval not granted; policy grade self_reported) and planning-artifact shasums were not recomputed.

assumptions_to_verify: run_forever long-lived loop behaves under real scheduling (tested via monkeypatched stop:2309)
heartbeat thread terminates on lease rejection (test :1986 asserts not alive)
contradictions_checked: PRD out-of-scope 'no SKIP LOCKED' vs impl — impl uses BEGIN IMMEDIATE single-writer, consistent
PRD 'submit unchanged' vs diff — new code is dispatcher/lease APIs + poll bridge, submit reserve path not rewritten, consistent
duplicate-spawn risk — claim filters pid IS NULL and stale-claim guard, no double spawn
missing_evidence: executed pytest pass/fail output for dispatcher/lease/migration tests
recomputed sha256 of immutable planning artifacts vs handoff-declared hashes
critical_review.strongest_objection: Test results are self-reported: pytest was not executed in this gate, so GREEN is asserted from source inspection of non-vacuous tests rather than an executed run.
critical_review.what_would_change_my_mind: An executed pytest run showing any dispatcher/lease/migration test failing, or a planning-artifact sha mismatch against the handoff packet.

outcome.summary: Layer 0.5 SQLite single-writer dispatcher (leases, heartbeat reaper, admission, bounded retry, poison parking) verified at current source; all 5 PRD promises realized and covered by non-vacuous public-boundary tests. ACCEPT.
